name: Arias Intel Corp.
summary: Arias Intel Corp. operates a digital media platform. Its digital media platform includes Hemp Inc, a business strategy and role playing mobile gaming app for gamers to develop, grow, and dispense virtual cannabis, as well as interact with celebrities and advertisers' brands within the game; Ufly, an on-demand legal medical cannabis delivery service; and SportXction, a real-time interactive software system. The company is headquartered in Tampa, Florida.
